endpoints.name: GET /me
endpoints.description: Provides information about the signed in user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}
endpoints.description: Build summary for each of the last 30 builds for a single git repo.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}
endpoints.description: Triggers a new build, returns a summary of the build.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: DELETE /project/{username}/{project}/build-cache
endpoints.description: Clears the cache for a project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/checkout-key
endpoints.description: Lists checkout keys.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/checkout-key/{fingerprint}
endpoints.description: Get a checkout key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username. Replace {{FINGERPRINT}} with a real fingerprint.

endpoints.name: DELETE /project/{username}/{project}/checkout-key/{fingerprint}
endpoints.description: Delete a checkout key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username. Replace {{FINGERPRINT}} with a real fingerprint.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/envvar
endpoints.description: Lists the environment variables for :project
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}/envvar
endpoints.description: Creates a new environment variable
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/envvar/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the hidden value of environment variable :name
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: DELETE /project/{username}/{project}/envvar/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes the environment variable named ':name'
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}/ssh-key
endpoints.description: Create an ssh key used to access external systems that require SSH key-based authentication
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}/tree/{branch}
endpoints.description:
Triggers a new build, returns a summary of the build.
Optional build parameters can be set using an experimental API.

Note: For more about build parameters, read about [using parameterized builds](https://circleci.com/docs/parameterized-builds/)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username. Replace {{BRANCH}} with a real branch.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/{build_num}
endpoints.description:
Full details for a single build. The response includes all of the fields from the build summary.
This is also the payload for the [notification webhooks](/docs/configuration/#notify), in which case this object is the value to a key named 'payload'.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{BUILD_NUM}} with a real build_num. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/{build_num}/artifacts
endpoints.description: List the artifacts produced by a given build.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{BUILD_NUM}} with a real build_num. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}/{build_num}/cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels the build, returns a summary of the build.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{BUILD_NUM}} with a real build_num. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: POST /project/{username}/{project}/{build_num}/retry
endpoints.description: Retries the build, returns a summary of the new build.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{BUILD_NUM}} with a real build_num. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /project/{username}/{project}/{build_num}/tests
endpoints.description:
Provides test metadata for a build
Note: [Learn how to set up your builds to collect test metadata](https://circleci.com/docs/test-metadata/)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{BUILD_NUM}} with a real build_num. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /projects
endpoints.description: List of all the projects you're following on CircleCI, with build information organized by branch.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /recent-builds
endpoints.description: Build summary for each of the last 30 recent builds, ordered by build_num.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /user/heroku-key
endpoints.description: Adds your Heroku API key to CircleCI, takes apikey as form param name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{CIRCLECI_API_KEY}} with your CIRCLECI API KEY.
